column3:
This pack includes 50+ Premium, hand-picked S-Log3 clips filmed in XAVC S-I 4K, 10 bit 4:2:2. Perfect for color grading practice. 

Every clip has been trimmed to the exact in/out points I used in my edits — so you’re getting only the best moments. No scrubbing. No re-encoding. Just clean, production-ready footage.

This footage is not for commercial use. It is provided solely for personal, educational, and color-grading practicepurposes. Redistribution, resale, or inclusion in paid client work is strictly prohibited.

The Creator Bundle is our best-value pack, built for filmmakers and content creators who want maximum creative flexibility in one complete toolkit.

This bundle gives you a powerful, end-to-end toolkit that covers everything from color and motion, to typography and visual emphasis, all in one place.

If you want to move fast, stay consistent, and keep your edits looking intentional, then this is it!
